$comment: Canonical org-wide label set for the Muse PR workflows (review loop triggers, state, and per-agent outcomes). Synced to repos by scripts/sync-repo-labels.sh; the review workflow also self-bootstraps these on first use in any repo.

labels.name: muse:review
labels.description: Request a Muse review round (re-add to re-run)

labels.name: muse:force
labels.description: Force a Muse round even if this SHA was already reviewed

labels.name: muse:error
labels.description: A Muse review agent failed — see workflow run

labels.name: review:approved
labels.description: Muse code review: no blocking findings

labels.name: review:needs-changes
labels.description: Muse code review: blocking findings open

labels.name: security:clear
labels.description: Muse security review: no blocking findings

labels.name: security:flagged
labels.description: Muse security review: blocking findings open

labels.name: tests:sufficient
labels.description: Muse test review: coverage adequate for this diff

labels.name: tests:needs-work
labels.description: Muse test review: missing tests for this diff
